g.text: Application repositories -> sequential quality gates -> ACR -> Helm branch promotion -> Argo CD -> AKS
Required but not checked in yet
Short-lived branch convention, automated PR creation, and protected main
Backend and dashboard variants converge on SonarCloud and Snyk
Immutable commit image, ACR push, Helm test values update, and manifest validation
Versioned image promotion and reviewed prod values PR
Argo CD watches desired state and reconciles the production cluster
Credentials, permissions, concurrency, evidence, notifications, and repository coverage
Create PR -> main with gh CLI
10 image repositories: dashboard, API gateway, GitHub, review orchestrator, Terraform runner, security, cost, governance, AI, notification
review-worker reuses orchestrator image | kairoai-shared has library-only CI
PR required | one reviewer approval | no direct push
PR checks must be visible before merge
npm run lint -> npm run build
upload Security tab -> push both tags
Trigger: PR or push to main/test/prod
2. helm template all dev service values
Known gap: no checked-in Argo Application currently watches deployments:test
Fail if service mapping is missing
Version tag is the prod values target
Runs on PR and prod push
Desired state is Git, not CI kubectl
Argo renders Helm and reconciles deployments
Pods pull prod-vX.Y.Z from hub ACR
Result: reviewed version tag in Git + immutable image in ACR + continuously reconciled AKS workload
Use org secrets where shared; least privilege and selected-repo visibility
Prod values PR: token must read/write deployments and PRs
Azure authentication uses federated OIDC; no ACR password stored
PR concurrency: cancel stale synchronize runs
Merge/release concurrency: never cancel active promotion
Immutable SHA source -> version aliases; production is not rebuilt
Pinned action SHAs in release; versioned actions elsewhere
Slack incoming webhook with workflow link
Triggered for verify/quality, image/ACR/Helm, and release failures
Report links: Actions, SonarCloud, Snyk, SARIF Security tab
Hard gates: lint, unit tests, app build, Docker smoke, secret checks, Azure login, ACR pull/push, Helm file update, Helm lint, kubeconform, PR approval.
Report-only today: Snyk, Trivy, Checkov Kubernetes; Sonar behavior depends on each reusable workflow output.
Pilot exception: merged-main build gate has approval/build-label checks commented out. Re-enable after pilot.
Known deployment gap: test branch receives values updates but no checked-in test Argo Application watches it.
